description: Quote card. A black header bar at top carries the white 'Blaze media' logo (with a flame-stylized 'B'). Below, on a cream off-white background, a rust-red sans-serif quotation fills the frame: "'By rooting out fraud and abuse, the Department of Labor and our federal partners will ensure that highly skilled jobs go to Americans first.'" There is no photo or illustration.
notable_text: 'By rooting out fraud and abuse, the Department of Labor and our federal partners will ensure that highly skilled jobs go to Americans first.'
